case_title: QUINTERO, MARIA VS REYES, ENRIQUE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY QUINTERO, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT REYES, ENRIQUE REYES, MARIE ELENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUINTERO, MARIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT REYES, ENRIQUE REYES, MARIE ELENA PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
